name: Peach and Raisin Risotto
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Frozen peaches in syrup (Thawed, 10 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the peaches and reserve the syrup. Cut the peaches into 1/2-inch pieces.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine the reserved syrup with enough water to measure 4 cups. Bring this mixture to a simmer and maintain it at a simmer over moderately low heat.
3. In a large nonreactive saucepan or flameproof casserole, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over moderate heat.
4. Add currants and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add rice and stir until well coated with the butter and slightly translucent. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
6. Add rum and cook until it evaporates.
7. Gradually add 1/2 cup of the simmering syrup, cooking and stirring constantly until the rice has absorbed most of the liquid.
8. Adjust heat as necessary to maintain a simmer.
9. Continue adding the simmering syrup (1/2 cup at a time), cooking and stirring constantly until the rice is tender but still firm and bound with a creamy sauce (3-6 minutes longer).
10. Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter, granulated sugar, reserved peaches, and heavy cream.
11. Continue cooking, stirring, and adding syrup as necessary until the dish reaches your desired consistency.
12. Serve immediately. Pass brown sugar separately.
